symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $462.12 up 6.94% yesterday near 52-week high of $465.38 with all EMAs above price and GC confirmed. Strong Stage2 6/7 and RS 100.0 setup in confirmed uptrend. Catalyst from TSMC's technological dominance in advanced chips and AI supply chain repeatedly highlighted by Intel CEO comments on quality gap.
